title: selaginella durvillaei
intro: Selaginella durvillaei, also known as "tong suan," is a type of ancient, primitive plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions, including respiratory problems and digestive issues, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Selaginella durvillaei include relief from coughs and colds, improved lung function, and enhanced digestion. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine formulas.
